creator: minsoochoo0122@proton.me
text:
Document: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/virtualization.html


FreeBSD as a Guest on Parallels for Mac OS® X -> FreeBSD as a Guest on Parallels Dekstop for Mac for macOS®

FreeBSD as a Guest on Virtual PC for Windows® -> It's outdated and runs on until Windows 7, which Microsoft stopped further supports since January 2020.

We need FreeBSD as a Guest on VMware Workstation for Windows and Linux chapter.

FreeBSD as a Guest on VMware Fusion for Mac OS® and FreeBSD as a Guest on VMware Workstation for Windows and Linux -> after installation, install open-vm-tools via pkg or install xf86-input-vmmouse and xf86-video-vmware from x11-driver ports.

21.5. FreeBSD as a Guest on VirtualBox™ -> noted that the guest addition for FreeBSD is outdated, and the latest version(6.1.14) doesn't work when try boot from .iso
